name: Jeremiah Smith
scoutingReport: Premier boundary receiver with rare size, speed and ball skills; a blue-chip 2027 prospect who can win vertically, separate through contact and create after the catch.

name: Arch Manning
scoutingReport: Prototype quarterback with NFL bloodlines, plus arm talent and improving mobility; projects as an early 2027 option if his processing and full-season consistency continue to grow.

name: Colin Simmons
scoutingReport: Explosive edge rusher with first-step juice, bend and closing burst; profiles as a disruptive pressure creator with room to add power.

name: Dante Moore
scoutingReport: Smooth pocket passer with high-end accuracy, touch and rhythm; offers starter traits if he keeps improving pressure management and downfield aggression.

name: Dylan Stewart
scoutingReport: Long, twitched-up pass rusher with outstanding traits; wins with burst and length while developing a more complete rush plan.

name: Leonard Moore
scoutingReport: Long corner with impressive ball production and man-coverage tools; size and instincts give him top-of-the-class defensive back upside.

name: Cam Coleman
scoutingReport: Big-play receiver with catch-radius and vertical ability; dangerous above the rim and still improving as a nuanced route runner.

name: Jordan Seaton
scoutingReport: Athletic tackle prospect with premium movement skills and pass-protection upside; projects as a high-end blindside or right tackle candidate.

name: Julian Sayin
scoutingReport: Accurate, efficient passer with quick decisions and touch; size is average, but timing and ball placement keep him in the early-round conversation.

name: Trevor Goosby
scoutingReport: Massive offensive tackle with length, power and SEC experience; has the tools to develop into a franchise-caliber edge protector.

name: Dakorien Moore
scoutingReport: Explosive receiver with elite acceleration and open-field creativity; can stress defenses vertically and after the catch.

name: David Stone
scoutingReport: Powerful interior defender with quickness and heavy hands; disruptive against the run with upside as a pocket-collapsing pass rusher.

name: Justin Scott
scoutingReport: Big, athletic defensive lineman with gap-control strength and pass-rush traits; flashes the ability to become a three-down interior force.

name: Sammy Brown
scoutingReport: Dynamic linebacker with range, burst and downhill physicality; offers blitz value and sideline-to-sideline pursuit skills.

name: Rasheem Biles
scoutingReport: Fast, productive linebacker with coverage range and playmaking instincts; fits modern defenses that ask linebackers to run and cover.

name: Jelani McDonald
scoutingReport: Versatile safety with size and range; can rotate deep, match tight ends and support the run from multiple alignments.

name: David Sanders Jr.
scoutingReport: Former elite recruit with rare tackle athleticism; projects as a high-upside pass protector as technique and strength mature.

name: KJ Bolden
scoutingReport: Explosive defensive back with coverage versatility and return ability; can play safety, nickel or matchup roles.

name: Ellis Robinson IV
scoutingReport: Fluid cover corner with five-star traits, speed and ball skills; press technique and consistency will determine his ceiling.

name: Ryan Williams
scoutingReport: Electric receiver with instant acceleration and separation ability; a home-run threat despite a lean frame.

name: Elijah Rushing
scoutingReport: Long edge defender with developmental pass-rush upside; length, frame and athleticism make him a high-ceiling 2027 projection.

name: Williams Nwaneri
scoutingReport: Powerful, long defensive end with rare physical tools; can set the edge and grow into a dangerous power rusher.

name: TJ Capers
scoutingReport: Athletic linebacker with coverage upside and closing speed; profiles as a movable second-level defender.

name: Duce Robinson
scoutingReport: Oversized receiving weapon with basketball-style catch radius; creates mismatches detached or inline if blocking continues to develop.

name: Justice Haynes
scoutingReport: Compact, explosive runner with vision, burst and receiving value; has three-down potential in a zone-heavy offense.

name: Jerrick Gibson
scoutingReport: Physical runner with burst through the hole and contact balance; offers early-down value with room to grow as a receiver.

name: Aidan Chiles
scoutingReport: Toolsy quarterback with mobility and arm strength; developmental upside hinges on accuracy and decision-making growth.

name: CJ Carr
scoutingReport: Polished passer with anticipation and pocket feel; has starter upside as his arm strength and live-game résumé expand.

name: Darian Mensah
scoutingReport: Ascending quarterback prospect with poise, accuracy and functional mobility; a strong season could push him up boards.

name: Drew Mestemaker
scoutingReport: Intriguing passer with size and production trajectory; projects as a developmental quarterback with rising-stock potential.

name: Kelley Jones
scoutingReport: Rarely long corner with man-coverage upside, ball production and recovery speed; strength and tackling refinement are next steps.

name: Trinidad Chambliss
scoutingReport: Experienced dual-threat quarterback with accuracy, pocket movement and pressure answers; could rise with another efficient season.

name: Kyngstonn Viliamu-Asa
scoutingReport: Instinctive three-down linebacker with downhill trigger, coverage range and finishing ability; projects as a defensive leader with every-down versatility.

name: Carter Smith
scoutingReport: Athletic left tackle prospect with quality feet, balance and recovery skills; offers blind-side upside if his anchor and hand placement keep improving.

name: Matayo Uiagalelei
scoutingReport: Powerful edge defender with length, heavy hands and inside-out rush ability; sets a firm edge while flashing pocket-collapsing strength.

name: Cayden Green
scoutingReport: Massive offensive tackle with SEC-tested power and positional flexibility; wins with grip strength, torque and a mauling run-game demeanor.

name: Damon Wilson II
scoutingReport: Explosive pass rusher with first-step burst and bend; has the athletic profile to become a high-pressure edge if his counter package matures.

name: Will Echoles
scoutingReport: Disruptive interior lineman with stout leverage and active hands; combines run-game toughness with enough quickness to push the pocket.

name: Ahmad Hardy
scoutingReport: Compact, violent runner with contact balance and one-cut burst; brings feature-back traits when paired with improved passing-down polish.

name: Trey'Dez Green
scoutingReport: Oversized receiving tight end with rare catch radius and red-zone utility; creates matchup stress with basketball-style body control.

name: PJ Williams
scoutingReport: Experienced tackle with a sturdy frame and reliable pass sets; profiles as a polished edge protector with swing-tackle flexibility.

name: Chris Cole
scoutingReport: Fast second-level defender with coverage upside and blitz timing; offers modern linebacker range with room to grow against downhill run schemes.

name: Austin Siereveld
scoutingReport: Physical blocker with tackle size and guard power; moves defenders in the run game and has the frame to handle NFL strength.

name: Tae Johnson
scoutingReport: Rangy safety with ball skills, tackling reliability and split-field versatility; can patrol space or rotate downhill into the box.

name: Dashawn Spears
scoutingReport: Big, fast safety with impressive closing burst and run support temperament; brings interchangeable backend traits and special-teams value.

name: Jamari Johnson
scoutingReport: Well-built tight end with seam-stretching tools and inline potential; combines soft hands with enough mass to develop as a blocker.

name: A'Mauri Washington
scoutingReport: Powerful nose/interior defender with unusual movement skills for his size; controls gaps and can collapse the middle with raw strength.

name: Brendan Sorsby
scoutingReport: Strong-framed quarterback with mobility, toughness and vertical arm talent; decision-making gains could push him into the top quarterback tier.

name: KJ Duff
scoutingReport: Towering receiver with contested-catch dominance and a massive target window; offers boundary mismatch ability and red-zone upside.

name: Chris Peal
scoutingReport: Long, explosive corner with zone instincts and recovery speed; has the athletic foundation to match bigger receivers outside.

name: Jordan Ross
scoutingReport: High-upside edge rusher with length, speed and closing burst; threatens tackles with space-rush athleticism and developmental power.

name: Teitum Tuioti
scoutingReport: Heavy-handed edge defender with run-game strength and pocket squeeze; wins with leverage and power while adding pass-rush nuance.

name: Brice Pollock
scoutingReport: Ball-hawking corner with route vision and takeaways production; fits zone-heavy looks and has enough speed to carry verticals.
